name: Provider integration
about: Request or document a new model/provider integration
title: "[Provider] "
labels: video-provider

---

## Provider

Name and link to official documentation.

## Capability

- [ ] Text-to-video
- [ ] Image-to-video
- [ ] Character/reference conditioning
- [ ] Audio/voice
- [ ] Other:

## API Shape

Describe submit, poll, download, authentication, and pricing behavior.

## Required Inputs

List required prompt, image, duration, aspect ratio, seed, or model fields.

## Expected Output

Describe media format, resolution, duration, and metadata.

## Licensing / Usage Notes

Mention restrictions, commercial-use terms, or attribution requirements.
